rows.label: qev090801_MSG0006
rows.name:
H.B.! Pulala looking
for friend named H.B.![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0007
rows.name: And I've been looking for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0008
rows.name:
I spoke to Eleonora. I take it you're
the Nopon who has been asking after me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0009
rows.name: Huh? Glasses friend is H.B.?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah, the scope of my fame is
terrifying. My name has become
a chorus across races![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Friends of Pulala always talk
about amazing man with 200 IQ.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0012
rows.name:
And Bias speak of combat skills.
Say you fight anything. That
no creature is too fierce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0013_m
rows.name:
Yes, all true, I'm afraid. My
partner here will attest to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0013_f
rows.name:
Yes, all true, I'm afraid. My
partner here will attest to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev090801_SEL0031
rows.name: Say that it's all true and more.

rows.label: qev090801_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev090801_SEL0041
rows.name: Laugh at their absurd claims.

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0014
rows.name:
Admirable. A lesser BLADE would
be blinded with envy, and yet
you remain a beacon of truth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0015
rows.name:
Jealousy is an ugly thing. You
really must learn to control it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Now, what was it you needed? I'll do
anything within my power—which is anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0017
rows.name: That worked just like Eleonora say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Butter up glasses man with random
flatterings, and he do any job Pulala want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Quiet, fool! Earth alien is falling
for it. Do not be so honest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0020
rows.name: Hmm, what's this about honesty?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0021
rows.name: Just another fine trait of friend H.B.![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Pulala and tentacle friend have job
only amazing man like H.B. can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Recently, terrible Bias people
are hurting poor Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0024
rows.name:
It is Blood-king Gelvo Banth. Even among
Cavern Clan, his brutality is known.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0025
rows.name: The name says it all, I suspect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Few days ago, bloody king attack caravan
on trade route and roast everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0027
rows.name:
If friends do not help, Nopon
everywhere become lunch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0028
rows.name:
Despicable... This barbarian must be
brought to heel as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0029
rows.name:
But bloody king is clever. No one knows
where his super-secret base is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hiding in shadows... Tormenting the
weak... Typical Cavern scum behavior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0031
rows.name:
Pulala heard Pathfinder friends
good at gathering info, came to
seek help finding bloody king![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0032
rows.name:
Well, we ARE the eyes and ears of
BLADE. All of Mira is our backyard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'll have a look on
FrontierNet straightaway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0034
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0035
rows.name: Right. I'd say we found our base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0036
rows.name: Amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0036_2
rows.name:
My clansmen looked
everywhere... Found nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0037
rows.name: What magic is this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0038
rows.name:
Just the magic of hard work and
diligent data-probe installation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0039
rows.name:
All the answers are just a click away.
But for now, I have a despot to topple![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0040
rows.name: Friends do that for Pulala?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0041
rows.name:
Pulala heard fighting
was Avalancher job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0042
rows.name:
I don't trust anyone else to finish what
I've started. I'll see it through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0043_m
rows.name:
Well, I and my new assistant
here. Isn't that right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0043_f
rows.name:
Well, I and my new assistant
here. Isn't that right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_JNK0050
rows.name: Wonder

rows.label: qev090801_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask H.B. if he's really going
to steal a Avalancher job.

rows.label: qev090801_JNK0060
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev090801_SEL0061
rows.name: Nod grimly and prepare for battle.

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0044
rows.name:
I've often told Commander
Vandham that his system of
segregated Unions is obsolete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0045
rows.name:
Those with ability should
be free to exercise it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0046
rows.name:
And now I shall prove just that by
eliminating this blood-king character.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm glad I asked you for
help in this matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0048
rows.name:
Some BLADEs cling to that obsolete
system of segregated Unions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0049
rows.name:
It does my heart good to see
that you are not one of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0050
rows.name:
Bringing this blood-king to
justice will be yet more proof
that I am correct on this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0051
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0052
rows.name:
No, I'm not seeing any
likely Bias activity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0053
rows.name:
It seems we don't have
enough active data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0054
rows.name:
Is something wrong? Did
friend not find Gelvo Banth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0055
rows.name:
No cause for concern. Wait here for
a moment while I consult Eleonora.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090801_MSG0056
rows.name:
Come. I'm sure she'll have some sort
of pertinent information I can use.[ST:wait ]
